scripts.backup:db: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src=process.env.DB_PATH||path.join(process.cwd(),'data.db'); const stamp=new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g,'-'); const outDir=path.join(process.cwd(),'backups'); fs.mkdirSync(outDir,{recursive:true}); const base=path.basename(src); const dest=path.join(outDir, `${stamp}-${base}`); fs.copyFileSync(src,dest); console.log(dest);"
